title: Lazy Sunday Nutty Crumbly Gluten-Free Rice Noodles
description: A comforting and effortless Canadian dish featuring flat gluten-free rice noodles with a nutty flavor profile for a lazy Sunday meal.
instructions: Bring a pot of water to a boil and cook the rice noodles according to package instructions.
While the noodles are cooking, melt the butter in a saucepan over medium heat.
Whisk together the melted butter and beaten egg until fully combined and smooth.
Once the noodles are cooked, drain them well and add them directly into the egg-butter mixture. Toss gently to coat evenly.
